NOTICE OF JOINDER IN OBJECTIONS OF MARKO'FLYNN FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'FLYNN, RITA

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. JOINDER OF DEFENDANT WIEGEL & FRIED, LLP TO THE DEMURRER FILED BY CLIFFORD E. FRIED TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS - THE MOTION FOR JOINDER IN DEMURRER IS GRANTED. THE MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT CLIFFORD FRIED'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED AS TO THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION AND SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION. ON A DEMURRER, THE COURT ONLY LOOKS AT THE FACE OF THE COMPLAINT AND, FROM THE FACE OF THE SECOND AMENDED COMPLAINT, THE FIRST CAUSE OF ACTION IS NOT TIME-BARRED. THE SECOND CAUSE OF ACTION FAILS TO ALLEGE: (1) PLAINTIFFS' PERFORMANCE OR EXCUSE FOR NONPERFORMANCE OF THE CONTRACT; (2) DEFENDANTS' BREACH; AND (3) RESULTING DAMAGE TO PLAINTIFFS. PLAINTIFFS ARE GRANTED LEAVE TO AMEND, IF THEY CAN IN DO SO IN GOOD FAITH, TO ALLEGE FACTS SUFFICIENT TO CONSTITUTE A BREACH OF CONTRACT CLAIM. THE COURT DECLINES TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE REQUESTED DOCUMENTS. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: ERNEST GOLDSMITH, CLERK: CYNTHIA HERBERT; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-10-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES - J. MARK O'FLYNN, TEL. NO. 775-6011, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT CLIFFORD FRIED'S DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT is Overruled as to the first cause of action and sustained with leave to amend as to the second cause of action. On a demurrer, the Court only looks at the face of the complaint and, from the face of the Second Amended Complaint, the first cause of action is not time-barred. The second cause of action fails to allege: (1) Plaintiffs' performance or excuse for nonperformance of the contract; (2) Defendants' breach; and (3) resulting damage to Plaintiffs. Plaintiffs are granted leave to amend, if they can in do so in good faith, to allege facts sufficient to constitute a breach of contract claim. The Court declines to take judicial notice of the requested documents. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
=(302/EHG)

DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT

APPEARANCES - J. MARK O'FLYNN, TEL. NO. 775-6011, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
NO OTHER APPEARANCES ON THE MATTER.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. JOINDER OF DEFENDANT WIEGEL & FRIED, LLP'
TO THE DEMURRER FILED BY CLIFFORD E. FRIED TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT AND MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS - The motion for Joinder in Demurrer is granted. The motion for judgment on the pleadings is denied. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976 =(302/EHG)
